startPoint.en: Talk to Santa Claus near his grotto in the Land of Snow's Christmas Village.
startPoint.es: Habla con Santa Claus cerca de su gruta en el Christmas Village de Land of Snow.

rewards.name: Winter Hat (green and red)
rewards.display: Winter Hat and Winter Scarf (green and red)

rewards.name: Fort Forinthry
rewards.display: Ability to place a Christmas tree and other decorations in Fort Forinthry with Zoe

rewards.name: Santa's sack
rewards.display: Santa's sack that allows the player to deliver one present a day in return for more Christmas spirit

rewards.name: Emotes from previous Christmas events (if not unlocked)
rewards.display: Emotes from previous Christmas events (if not unlocked)

rewards.name: Christmas Village
rewards.display: Access to the decoration making activity in the Christmas Village

text.en: Talk to Santa Claus in the southern part of Christmas Village. (opciones de chat: Accept)
text.es: Habla con Santa Claus en la parte sur de Christmas Village. (opciones de chat: Accept)

text.en: Talk to the snow imp following you. (opciones de chat: 1 It's Snow Bother quest.)
text.es: Habla con el snow imp que te sigue. (opciones de chat: 1 It's Snow Bother quest.)

text.en: Investigate the Christmas spirit map south-east.
text.es: Investiga el mapa del espíritu navideño al sureste.

text.en: Create decorations at the decoration bench in Diango's Workshop to the east; you will fail.
text.es: Crea decoraciones en el banco de decoración de Diango's Workshop al este; fallarás.

text.en: Teleport to the Falador lodestone.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a la piedra de viaje de Falador.

text.en: Search the sleigh just inside Falador's northern entrance.
text.es: Registra el trineo justo dentro de la entrada norte de Falador.

text.en: Search five piles of snow ():
text.es: Busca cinco montones de nieve ():

text.en: By Sir Tiffy Cashien in Falador Park.
text.es: Junto a Sir Tiffy Cashien en Falador Park.

text.en: North of the Estate agent's office.
text.es: Al norte de la oficina del Estate agent.

text.en: On the White Knights' Castle bridge.
text.es: En el puente del White Knights' Castle.

text.en: Outside Falador west bank.
text.es: Fuera del banco oeste de Falador.

text.en: Inside Flynn's Mace Market.
text.es: Dentro de Flynn's Mace Market.

text.en: Add decorations to the missing Christmas decorations just outside the Rising Sun pub.
text.es: Añade decoraciones a las decoraciones navideñas que faltan justo fuera del pub Rising Sun.

text.en: Teleport to the Lumbridge lodestone.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a la piedra de viaje de Lumbridge.

text.en: Search the sleigh just to the south-east.
text.es: Registra el trineo justo al sureste.

text.en: Search five piles of snow ():
text.es: Busca cinco montones de nieve ():

text.en: Inside Lumbridge Church.
text.es: Dentro de la iglesia de Lumbridge.

text.en: Inside Bob's Brilliant Axes.
text.es: Dentro de Bob's Brilliant Axes.

text.en: By the bank chest in Lumbridge Market.
text.es: Junto al cofre bancario en el Lumbridge Market.

text.en: Inside the kitchen of the Lumbridge Castle.
text.es: Dentro de la cocina del Lumbridge Castle.

text.en: Inside the northern room of eastern gatehouse of the Lumbridge Castle.
text.es: Dentro de la sala norte de la caseta de guardia este del Lumbridge Castle.

text.en: Add decorations to the missing Christmas decorations just south of the Lumbridge lodestone.
text.es: Añade decoraciones a las decoraciones navideñas que faltan justo al sur de la piedra de viaje de Lumbridge.

text.en: Make your way to Varrock Square.
text.es: Dirígete a Varrock Square.

text.en: Search the sleigh near the Varrock Palace entrance.
text.es: Registra el trineo cerca de la entrada del Varrock Palace.

text.en: Find the five piles of snow ():
text.es: Encuentra los cinco montones de nieve ():

text.en: Just inside Varrock Palace courtyard.
text.es: Justo dentro del patio del Varrock Palace.

text.en: Inside Zaff's Superior Spellcasting.
text.es: Dentro de Zaff's Superior Spellcasting.

text.en: Inside Aris' Reward Shop.
text.es: Dentro de Aris' Reward Shop.

text.en: Near Pelters' Veg Stall, behind Varrock General Store.
text.es: Cerca del puesto de verduras de Pelters, detrás de la Varrock General Store.

text.en: Inside Horvik's Armour Shop.
text.es: Dentro de la Horvik's Armour Shop.

text.en: Add decorations to the missing Christmas decorations in the north-eastern part of Varrock Square.
text.es: Añade decoraciones a las decoraciones navideñas que faltan en la parte noreste de Varrock Square.

text.en: Teleport back to Christmas Village.
text.es: Teletranspórtate de vuelta a Christmas Village.

text.en: Investigate the Christmas spirit map.
text.es: Investiga el mapa del espíritu navideño.

text.en: Take Santa's request next to the map.
text.es: Recoge la petición de Santa junto al mapa.

text.en: Make five of the following deliveries:
text.es: Realiza cinco de las siguientes entregas:

text.en: You need to check Santa's sack in your backpack and choose a character in the interface before talking to them with the sack and some backpack space.
text.es: Necesitas revisar el saco de Santa en tu mochila y elegir un personaje en la interfaz antes de hablar con él con el saco y algo de espacio libre en la mochila.

text.en: Talk to Santa Claus in the southern part of Christmas Village to complete the quest.
text.es: Habla con Santa Claus en la parte sur de Christmas Village para completar la misión.
